sections.title: Attempting to pickpocket before Haunted Mine
Attempting to pickpocket the zealot after giving him the key back

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've done it, I've managed to recreate the salve amulet that you spoke of.

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: That hardly seems likely. There is no way you could have made it to the bottom of the mines without the key which is in my possession.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I, er... found another way down.

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: Mock me not, this is a serious task I am undertaking. I don't have the time for your halfwitted attempt at humour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Correction, the key that was in your possession.

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: My key, where is it? You stole it?

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: Return that key to me now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I've finished with it now anyway.

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: Good, maybe all is not lost, despite your apparent lack of common sense.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... you're welcome?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, maybe I'll just keep hold of it for now.

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: Meddling fool, there are bigger things at stake here than you and your petty thieving intellect can understand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, don't believe me.

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: Then it is fortunate for us that Saradomin has guided you. Success certainly doesn't seem likely to have stemmed from rational behaviour on your part.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You still haven't forgiven me for borrowing your key have you?

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: Borrowed!? You stole it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, maybe I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What powers does the salve amulet have?

lines.speaker: Zealot
lines.text: From what I have heard they would be put to best use in the slaying of the evil undead, the zombies and skeletons that walk this land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the tip.
